s / Questions to be Addressed (redirected from Main.Questions ) The following questions were raised in the TerraSwarm annual review in November 2014, and are organized according to the three levels of accessor specification described in the Accessors

accessor specification described in the Accessors white paper (interface, component, and composition): Interface Subtyping ? Ontologies? Contracts ? Discovery? Component Languages? Libraries ? Sandboxing? Authentication Error handling? Composition W
